category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Garden as a command runner and multi-repo Git configuration tool.
source_facts.description says Garden grows and cultivates collections of Git trees.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the Garden User Guide on garden-rs.gitlab.io and API documentation on docs.rs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/garden-rs/garden; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes Git worktrees, command running, and Rust package installation.
Official GitHub topics include git, rust, submodules, developer-tools, worktree, and command-runner.
